Dribbble is a community for graphic design, founded in 2009. The platform is dedicated to helping professional designers earn a living by showcasing their work and connecting with opportunities. Dribbble operates as a fully remote company with a team of 22 people. (A)

Top specialties include Product Design, Illustration, Branding, Web Design, Animation, Mobile, Typography, and Print. The company was founded in 2009, is 100% remote, and employs 22 people. Dribbble focuses on supporting designers in finding work and inspiration, and offers resources for hiring talent and career development. (B)
